text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of the Oka Sho. Strangely
enough, I'm not scared at all...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Trainer. I'll show you what I look like
in full bloom on the track today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And when I come back... there's something I'd like
to talk to you about.
